children.heading: Qualification of contracts or arrangements
children.label: a Qualification of contracts or arrangements

children.text: such contracts or other funding arrangements will be consistent with the policies and purposes of this chapter and of potential benefit to other users in the public or private sectors;

provisions are made to evaluate the demonstration program and maintain improvement data, such evaluation either to be implemented by the participating parties in accordance with specifications established by the Center, or to be implemented by or on behalf of the Center; and
the participating parties agree that all information relating to any innovation or achievement generated in the course of any Center-funded demonstration program shall be public information.

children.heading: Duration of contracts or arrangements
children.label: b Duration of contracts or arrangements
children.text: No contract or other funding arrangement shall be made or entered into pursuant to the provisions of this chapter for a period of more than three years.

children.heading: Non-Federal share of project in cash or in kind
children.label: c Non-Federal share of project in cash or in kind
children.text: Any non-Federal share of a project may be in cash or in kind, fairly evaluated, including, but not limited to, plant, equipment, or services.
